between capitated payments and payments 
for services. Capitated payment claims are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS variable 
called CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to '2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' (Other 
Services claim). 

The Medicaid payment information corresponding to this variable is in the monthly 
MDCD_TOTAL_SPEND_01–12 variables variable; however, due to CMS payment redaction 
requirements the dollar totals will not reflect the (redacted) managed
